title: AI Inference Authority: Who's REALLY in Control? #shorts
summary: The video argues that despite self-hosted or secure AI deployments, ultimate control over AI inference remains concentrated with major providers like OpenAI and Anthropic. It emphasizes that understanding AI infrastructure is essential to grasp where real authority lies in the AI ecosystem.
